allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "src\\app\\projects" | Select-Object Name, Mode | Format-Table -AutoSize; if \(-not \(Test-Path "src\\app\\projects\\[id]"\)\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path "src\\app\\projects\\[id]" | Out-Null }; Get-ChildItem "src\\app\\projects" | Select-Object Name, Mode | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "src\\app\\api\\ideas\\[id]" | Select-Object Name, Mode | Format-Table -AutoSize; if \(-not \(Test-Path "src\\app\\api\\ideas\\[id]\\tasks"\)\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path "src\\app\\api\\ideas\\[id]\\tasks" | Out-Null }; if \(-not \(Test-Path "src\\app\\api\\ideas\\[id]\\tasks\\generate"\)\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path "src\\app\\api\\ideas\\[id]\\tasks\\generate" | Out-Null }; Get-ChildItem "src\\app\\api\\ideas\\[id]" | Select-Object Name, Mode | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($base = 'src\\app\\api\\ideas\\[id]'; $tasks = Join-Path $base 'tasks'; $generate = Join-Path $tasks 'generate'; if \(-not \(Test-Path -LiteralPath $tasks\)\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $tasks | Out-Null }; if \(-not \(Test-Path -LiteralPath $generate\)\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $generate | Out-Null }; Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $base | Select-Object Name, Mode | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($base='src\\app\\api\\tasks'; $id=Join-Path $base '[id]'; if \(-not \(Test-Path -LiteralPath $base\)\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $base | Out-Null }; if \(-not \(Test-Path -LiteralPath $id\)\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $id | Out-Null }; Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $base | Select-Object Name, Mode | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem . | Select-Object Name, Mode | Format-Table -AutoSize; if \(-not \(Test-Path "scripts"\)\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path "scripts" | Out-Null }; Get-ChildItem "scripts" | Select-Object Name, Mode | Format-Table -AutoSize)
PowerShell(git add README.md plan src scripts vitest.config.ts)
PowerShell(git commit -m "feat: complete week 2 planning flow")
Bash(git commit -m 'feat: add toast notifications and update home page layout *)
Bash(timeout 5 bash -c 'cat < /dev/null > /dev/tcp/127.0.0.1/5433 && echo "Tunnel connected" || echo "Tunnel failed"')

PowerShell($line = Select-String -Path '.env.local' -Pattern '^DATABASE_URL=' | Select-Object -First 1; $raw = $line.Line.Substring\('DATABASE_URL='.Length\).Trim\(\).Trim\('"'\); $afterScheme = $raw -replace '^postgres\(?:ql\)?://',''; $atIndex = $afterScheme.LastIndexOf\('@'\); $creds = $afterScheme.Substring\(0,$atIndex\); $hostDb = $afterScheme.Substring\($atIndex+1\); $colonIndex = $creds.IndexOf\(':'\); $user = $creds.Substring\(0,$colonIndex\); $password = $creds.Substring\($colonIndex+1\); $hostPart = \($hostDb -split '/',2\)[0]; $dbPart = \(\($hostDb -split '/',2\)[1] -split '\\?',2\)[0]; "user=$user hostPort=$hostPart database=$dbPart passwordLength=$\($password.Length\) passwordHasRawAt=$\($password.Contains\('@'\)\) passwordHasEncodedAt=$\($password.Contains\('%40'\)\)")

PowerShell($files = @\('.env.local', '.env'\); foreach \($file in $files\) { $line = Select-String -Path $file -Pattern '^DATABASE_URL=' | Select-Object -First 1; $raw = $line.Line.Substring\('DATABASE_URL='.Length\).Trim\(\).Trim\('"'\); $afterScheme = $raw -replace '^postgres\(?:ql\)?://',''; $atIndex = $afterScheme.LastIndexOf\('@'\); $creds = $afterScheme.Substring\(0,$atIndex\); $hostDb = $afterScheme.Substring\($atIndex+1\); $colonIndex = $creds.IndexOf\(':'\); $user = $creds.Substring\(0,$colonIndex\); $password = $creds.Substring\($colonIndex+1\); $hostPart = \($hostDb -split '/',2\)[0]; $dbPart = \(\($hostDb -split '/',2\)[1] -split '\\?',2\)[0]; "${file}: user=$user hostPort=$hostPart database=$dbPart rawAt=$\($password.Contains\('@'\)\) encodedAt=$\($password.Contains\('%40'\)\) passLen=$\($password.Length\)" })
